description: Synthetic placeholder fixtures only; no real user data.

title: Synthetic short clean Q&A

messages.content_text: I want a weekly planning note that is concise and only lists blockers, decisions, and next actions.
Use three headings: Blockers, Decisions, and Next Actions. Keep each bullet short.

expected_segments.summary: The user asks for a concise weekly planning note format.

fixture_notes: Exactly one segment should be produced.
Exercises short clean Q&A and a quiet preference.

title: Synthetic multi-topic re-entry with UUID-like text

messages.content_text: For the recipe draft, remember that I prefer extra lemon and less sugar.
Noted for the recipe draft: extra lemon, less sugar.
Switch topics. Debug this error id 11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111; that string is not a message id.
The UUID-like string should be treated as text in the message, not provenance.
Back to the recipe: make the glaze tart, not candy-sweet.

expected_segments.summary: The user prefers extra lemon and less sugar in the recipe draft.
The UUID-like string is message content, not provenance.
The user returns to the recipe and wants a tart glaze.

fixture_notes: Exercises multi-topic drift and return to an earlier topic.
A UUID-like string in message content must not be treated as a message id.

title: Synthetic tool placeholder and mixed privacy

messages.content_text: Summarize the attached file, but do not embed the file body as normal conversation text.
Content source: Source.file. Very long synthetic body omitted from this example.
The attachment is a project checklist. Key item: finish local-only benchmark review before changing production segmentation.

expected_segments.summary: The conversation asks for an attachment summary while preserving the tool artifact only as provenance.

fixture_notes: Tool message belongs in provenance span but its body should not become embeddable segment text.
Expected segment privacy tier is 2 because one covered message is tier 2.
